---
title: "Chapter 2: Introduction to R"
---

<div class="lecture-actions">
<a href="chapter2-slides.html" class="btn btn-dark" target="_blank">Slides</a>
<a href="chapter2-slides.html?print-pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" target="_blank">PDF</a>
</div>

---

<p class="wip" style="text-align:left; font-size:18px; letter-spacing:0.5px;">Work in Progress</p>
